title: Refuse invalid writes
description: A project owner trusts that the tool refuses to write any document that does not validate, so on-disk state is always valid even when the owner cannot inspect it.
iWant: the tool to refuse to write any document that does not validate against the schema
soThat: what is on disk is always valid, even though I cannot check it myself

acceptanceCriteria.description: A create or update that would produce an invalid document writes nothing
acceptanceCriteria.given: any create or update that would produce an invalid document

acceptanceCriteria.description: A successful write produces a document that validates against its schema
acceptanceCriteria.then: the written document validates against its schema

acceptanceCriteria.description: Validation uses the published schema bundle registered once at start-up, not a local copy
acceptanceCriteria.then: it uses the published schema bundle registered once at start-up, not a local copy that could drift
